svg.text: ① Composed + custom — energy1 deploys supply1 and builds bespoke grid / asset & OT-adjacent agents with agent1, all operated by run1.
② Humans control the grid — agents advise & recommend; operators act. No autonomous control of generation, grid or assets.
③ Safety-first & OT-separated — advisory only on the OT side; safety- & life-critical actions always human; code-aligned.
④ Grounded & reliable — recommendations tie to real grid & market data; run1 runs it 24/7 at incident-grade.
⑤ Compliant & secure — CERC / SERC & environmental alignment; critical-infrastructure-grade security & residency.
⑥ Outcome-led — reliability, outages, downtime, cost & safety, measured — delivered via the elan1 method.
